_comment: EXPERIMENTAL — first plugin hook in this repo. Two things unverified without a live install (checked 2026-07-05 vs CC docs): (1) plugin-hook autoload is not explicitly documented (skills/monitors are); (2) ExitPlanMode is not in the documented PreToolUse matcher example set and is elsewhere seen with PostToolUse, so this matcher may not fire — if it doesn't, swap to a PostToolUse matcher on ExitPlanMode or a Stop hook with the same additionalContext. Never blocks, so a non-firing hook is inert. See plugins/crucible/README.md.
